reference: Ideally, the surgeon is supposed to explain everything about your condition and the procedure you are about to undergo. The follow-up can be done by others as well. If you are not feeling satisfied, it would be better to get a second opinion.
text: Ideally, the surgeon is supposed to explain everything about your condition and the procedure you are about to undergo. The follow-up can be done by others as well. If not feeling satisfied, it would be better to get a second opinion.
